# AT6ix Logistics

> Toronto-based logistics company delivering same-day, final mile, and full-service logistics solutions province-wide across Ontario.

AT6ix Logistics is a full-service logistics provider headquartered in Toronto, Ontario. We serve businesses across the province with a complete range of delivery and fulfillment services — from same-day rush courier to white glove home delivery and third-party warehousing. AT6ix is built for B2B clients and e-commerce operators who need reliable, trackable logistics without delays.

## Services

- **Same-Day Delivery**: Urgent shipments picked up and delivered within hours across the GTA and Ontario.
- **Rush Delivery**: Expedited shipping for time-critical freight that can't wait for standard schedules.
- **Final Mile Delivery**: The critical last leg from distribution centres to end customers. Real-time tracking, route-optimized, built for commercial volume across all of Ontario.
- **Home Delivery**: Professional residential package delivery with care and reliability.
- **White Glove Delivery**: Premium handling for fragile, high-value, and oversized items. Includes careful placement, assembly where required, and climate-aware transport.
- **E-Commerce Fulfillment**: Order processing, picking, packing, and shipping for online retailers. Integrates with major e-commerce platforms.
- **Warehousing & Distribution**: Secure 3PL (third-party logistics) storage, inventory management, and province-wide distribution network operations from our Toronto facility.
- **Sortation Services**: Package sorting and logistics coordination for high-volume shipping operations.

## Service Area

Primary: Greater Toronto Area (Toronto, Mississauga, Brampton, Markham, Vaughan, Scarborough, North York, Etobicoke)
Province-wide: All of Ontario — Southern Ontario (Hamilton, London, Windsor, Kitchener-Waterloo, Ottawa) and Northern Ontario (Sudbury, Thunder Bay, Sault Ste. Marie) on request.

## Why AT6ix

- Ontario-wide coverage from a single Toronto-based provider
- Real-time shipment tracking from pickup to door
- 24/7 support for urgent and time-sensitive shipments
- 2-business-hour response time on all quote requests
- Full-service capability: courier, fulfillment, warehousing, and white glove under one roof
- B2B and e-commerce focused — not household moves

## Hours of Operation

Monday to Friday: 8:00 AM – 6:00 PM (Eastern Time)
Emergency/rush dispatch: 24/7

## Contact & Quotes

- Website: https://at6ixlogistics.com
- Email: info@at6ixlogistics.com
- Quote form: https://at6ixlogistics.com/#quote
- Response time: within 2 business hours (Mon–Fri)
- Location: Toronto, Ontario, Canada

## Frequently Asked Questions

**What areas does AT6ix Logistics serve?**
AT6ix Logistics is headquartered in Toronto and serves all of Ontario. Primary coverage includes the Greater Toronto Area and Southern Ontario. Northern Ontario routes are available on request.

**What types of businesses does AT6ix work with?**
AT6ix serves B2B clients, retailers, e-commerce operators, and any business that needs reliable delivery and fulfillment services across Ontario. We do not handle household moves.

**Does AT6ix offer same-day delivery?**
Yes. Same-day delivery is available for urgent shipments across the GTA and broader Ontario, subject to availability. Rush delivery is also available for time-critical freight.

**What is White Glove Delivery?**
White Glove Delivery is AT6ix's premium service for fragile, high-value, or oversized items. It includes careful handling, indoor placement, assembly where required, and climate-aware transport.

**Does AT6ix handle e-commerce fulfillment?**
Yes. AT6ix offers end-to-end e-commerce fulfillment including order processing, pick-and-pack, inventory management, and shipping. This service integrates with major e-commerce platforms.

**How do I get a logistics quote?**
Fill out the quote form at https://at6ixlogistics.com/#quote or email info@at6ixlogistics.com. All enquiries receive a response within 2 business hours, Monday through Friday.

**What is Final Mile Delivery?**
Final mile delivery is the last leg of the logistics chain — from a distribution centre or warehouse to the end customer. AT6ix specialises in efficient, tracked final mile delivery across Ontario.

**Does AT6ix offer warehousing?**
Yes. AT6ix provides 3PL warehousing and distribution services from its Toronto facility, including secure storage, inventory management, and province-wide distribution.
